title: Optimal
description: Modpack based on Fabric with many optimalization mods and base game quality improvements
body:
![How this modpack really works](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af706febeb87a35fc2cf25810c2b1b68e6eb150d.png)

Modpack includs many mods that boosts FPS and helps render entites. In this modpack are also included mods that improves quality of the game. Because of that, this modpack perfectly balances graphics addons with mods that help get higher FPS.
